savage_assessment.title: The Oracle of Over-Engineering
savage_assessment.verdict: This command has achieved the impossible: creating complexity to SOLVE complexity. It's like building a maze to help people find exits.
evidence: 499 lines to route tasks - that's more code than some entire applications
15 different patterns mentioned - collecting them like Pokemon cards
Complexity score of 8.49/5 while trying to REDUCE complexity
Has 4 thinking orchestration layers - thinking about thinking about thinking
savage_assessment.brutal_truth: You've created a Rube Goldberg machine for decision making. This router has more complexity than the tasks it routes.
savage_assessment.scientific_roast: With a 77% failure probability and σ=12.3%, this router fails more than a weather forecast.

savage_assessment.title: The Enhancement Paradox
savage_assessment.verdict: An 'intelligent' enhancer that violates its own intelligence guidelines. The irony is thicker than the abstraction layers.
evidence: 442 lines to enhance code - more than most classes need total
4-phase enhancement process for what could be direct improvements
Complexity score 30% above its own CLAUDE.md limits
Contains more enhancement planning than actual enhancement
savage_assessment.brutal_truth: This enhancer needs enhancing. It's like a diet book written by someone who's never lost weight.
savage_assessment.scientific_roast: 45% success rate means it fails more often than it succeeds. Even coin flips have better odds.

improvement_recommendations: Reduce phases from 4 to 1: 'enhance the damn code'
Cut validation theater - just validate by running tests
Make it do ONE thing well

savage_assessment.title: The Guardian That Needs a Guardian
savage_assessment.verdict: A hyperfocus tool so complex it causes analysis paralysis. It's like prescribing cocaine to treat anxiety.
evidence: 457 lines to manage focus - takes longer to configure than to use
7-step protocol to start focusing - by step 3 you've lost focus
3 MCP dependencies to manage simplicity - peak irony achieved
More configuration than a NASA launch sequence
savage_assessment.brutal_truth: This guardian protects you from hyperfocus by making you hyperfocus on the guardian. Meta-procrastination achieved.
savage_assessment.scientific_roast: 18% success probability with a 4,235% overcomplexity factor. This is statistically worse than doing nothing.

improvement_recommendations: Replace entire system with: 'Set timer for 90 minutes. Work.'
Remove all 7 phases - just start and stop
Delete pattern capture theater - use simple logging
Remember: The best focus tool is the one you actually use

scientific_conclusions.primary_finding: 100% of commands violate CLAUDE.md complexity limits
scientific_conclusions.statistical_significance: p < 0.001 - This is not random, this is systematic over-engineering
scientific_conclusions.effect_size: Large effect (Cohen's d = 2.83) - practically significant violation
scientific_conclusions.correlation_analysis: Strong positive correlation (r=0.94) between line count and complexity violation

savage_summary.overall_verdict: EPIC FAIL - These commands have achieved something remarkable: they've created more complexity than the problems they solve.
savage_summary.scientific_roast: With a 100% violation rate and mean complexity 56% above limits, these commands have the consistency of a broken clock - consistently wrong.
brutal_statistics: Average 7.83/5 complexity - that's not intelligent, that's mathematical impossibility
1398 total lines for 3 basic functions - War and Peace is shorter and more actionable
3 MCP dependencies average - more external calls than a customer service center
savage_summary.meta_irony: Commands designed to simplify complexity are themselves 69% more complex than allowed. That's not intelligence, that's performance art.
savage_summary.recommendation: Apply your own CLAUDE.md rules to these commands. If complexity score >= 5, STOP and simplify. Currently ALL of them would trigger the emergency brake.

immediate_actions: Replace orchestration with simple conditional logic
Cut documentation theater - add actual functionality
improvement_roadmap.success_criteria: All commands must achieve complexity score < 5
improvement_roadmap.measurement_plan: Re-benchmark after simplification - target 80% reduction in complexity
